title: mirabilis bigelovii var. aspera
intro: Mirabilis bigelovii var. aspera, also known as the rough desert four o'clock, is a variety of the Mirabilis bigelovii plant, a type of flowering plant in the four o'clock family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Mirabilis bigelovii var. aspera include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and prevent infection, making it beneficial for soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its health benefits.
